name: Tony Hinchcliffe
bio: Tony Hinchcliffe is an American comedian best known for roast and insult comedy and for hosting the live podcast Kill Tony since 2013, in which amateur comics perform one-minute sets for an on-stage panel. He moved to Los Angeles in 2007 and became a writer on the Comedy Central Roast series. He has released the specials One Shot, Making Friends, and the Kill Tony specials for Netflix.

timeline.ev: Moves to Los Angeles and starts at the Comedy Store
Launches the Kill Tony live podcast
Debut special One Shot premieres on Netflix
Kill Tony: Kill or Be Killed airs on Netflix

specials.t: Kill Tony: Kill or Be Killed
